title: kentrophyllum arborescens
intro: Kentrophyllum arborescens, also known as the tree kentrophyllum, is a plant species in the family Staphylocarpidae, native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Kentrophyllum arborescens have been used traditionally to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Kentrophyllum arborescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
